scripts.dev: pnpm build:desktop && cd dist/desktop && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 preview --port 3002
scripts.check: pnpm build && cd dist/desktop && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 check && cd ../portrait && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 check
scripts.inspect: pnpm build && cd dist/desktop && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 inspect --samples 15 && cd ../portrait && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 inspect --samples 15
scripts.render:desktop: pnpm build:desktop && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/desktop && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality high --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-desktop.mp4
scripts.render:portrait: pnpm build:portrait && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/portrait && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality high --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-portrait.mp4
scripts.render:web:desktop: VITE_SHOW_COPY=false VITE_OUTPUT_VARIANT=desktop-web vite build --mode desktop && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/desktop-web && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality high --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-desktop-web.mp4
scripts.render:web:portrait: VITE_SHOW_COPY=false VITE_OUTPUT_VARIANT=portrait-web vite build --mode portrait && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/portrait-web && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality high --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-portrait-web.mp4
scripts.render:determinism:desktop: VITE_SHOW_COPY=false VITE_OUTPUT_VARIANT=desktop-check VITE_COMP_ID=assurance-world-desktop-check VITE_COMP_WIDTH=480 VITE_COMP_HEIGHT=270 vite build --mode desktop && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/desktop-check && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality draft --no-browser-gpu --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-desktop-check-a.mp4 && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality draft --no-browser-gpu --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-desktop-check-b.mp4
scripts.render:determinism:portrait: VITE_SHOW_COPY=false VITE_OUTPUT_VARIANT=portrait-check VITE_COMP_ID=assurance-world-portrait-check VITE_COMP_WIDTH=270 VITE_COMP_HEIGHT=480 vite build --mode portrait && mkdir -p renders/masters && cd dist/portrait-check && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality draft --no-browser-gpu --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-portrait-check-a.mp4 && npx --yes hyperframes@0.7.60 render --fps 30 --quality draft --no-browser-gpu --output ../../renders/masters/assurance-world-portrait-check-b.mp4
